challenges.title: Image Gallery
challenges.description: Create three elements, each with both a src attribute and an alt attribute. Use different image sources and descriptive alt text for each. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code: assert html.lower().count('= 3, 'Should contain at least 3 elements' import re srcs = re.findall(r']+src=', html.lower()) assert len(srcs) >= 3, 'Each image should have a src attribute' alts = re.findall(r']+alt=', html.lower()) assert len(alts) >= 3, 'Each image should have an alt attribute'
hints: The alt attribute provides alternative text for accessibility

challenges.title: Figure Images
challenges.description: Create at least two images, each wrapped in a <figure> element with a <figcaption> providing a caption. Each image must have src and alt attributes. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code: assert html.lower().count('= 2, 'Should contain at least 2 ') >= 2, 'Should close both
hints: Wrap each image in <figure> and add <figcaption> for the caption
